Threatexpert.com Malicious URLs.description: Malicious URL blacklist feed from abuse.ch's URL repository tracking malware distribution vectors.
Threatexpert.com Malicious URLs.opsecNote: Retrieves historical blocklist data from abuse.ch infrastructure

Zeus C2 Tracker.description: abuse.ch project tracking Zeus command and control servers with domain and IP blocklists.
Zeus C2 Tracker.output: Domain/IP blocklist, Snort rules, Squid format
Zeus C2 Tracker.opsecNote: Queries public Zeus tracker database; no active scanning

Malware Domains Blacklist.description: Historical malware domains blocklist providing hosts file format malicious domain list.

Email Domain Validation.description: Free email domain validation tool checking DNS records, MX records, and mail server connectivity.
Email Domain Validation.opsecNote: Active mail server connectivity checks required for validation

Blackweb.description: Open-source project consolidating public malware domain blacklists optimized for Squid-Cache compatibility.
Blackweb.opsecNote: Aggregates existing public blacklist sources; requires DNS verification

Critical Stack Intel (R).description: Free threat intelligence feeds integrated with Bro/Zeek network security monitoring systems.
Critical Stack Intel (R).opsecNote: Requires registration; polled hourly from curated threat intelligence feeds

DNS Sinkhole.description: Malware domain sinkhole from malc0de.com providing DNS-based threat blocking zones.
DNS Sinkhole.opsecNote: Public malware database; Cloudflare CAPTCHA protection added

DNS-BH Malware Domain Blocklist.description: Legacy malware domain blocklist from RiskAnalytics using Black Hole DNS sinkhole technology.

Malware Domain List.description: Interactive malware domain reputation lookup providing verified malicious domain intelligence.
Malware Domain List.opsecNote: Queries curated malware domain database; passive lookup only

MalwareURL (R).description: Commercial malware URL reputation checker and blocklist service protecting networks from known malicious websites.
MalwareURL (R).opsecNote: Free lookup service available; commercial network integration available

scumware.org.description: Free malware and spyware tracking domain blacklist maintained by security community for 18+ years.
scumware.org.opsecNote: Community-maintained research database; passive lookup only

ZeuS Tracker.description: abuse.ch project providing comprehensive tracking of Zeus botnet C2 infrastructure with domain and IP blocklists.
ZeuS Tracker.output: Domain blocklist, IP blocklist, Snort rules, Squid format
ZeuS Tracker.opsecNote: Public tracker; passive monitoring of Zeus C2 activity

Shadowserver Foundation.description: Nonprofit providing comprehensive IP reputation intelligence and automated abuse reporting through daily network scanning.
Shadowserver Foundation.opsecNote: Passive intelligence from honeypots and network sensors; no active scanning

vURL Online.description: URL and domain dissection tool providing detailed reputation analysis and security assessment.
vURL Online.opsecNote: Passive analysis of URL components and reputation data

AlienVault Open Threat Exchange.description: Community-driven threat intelligence platform enabling collaborative defense with 180K+ participants sharing 19M+ threats daily.
AlienVault Open Threat Exchange.opsecNote: Community-sourced intelligence; free API access with registration

Web Inspector Online Scan.description: Free cloud-based website malware scanner with daily automated scanning and blacklist checking capabilities.
Web Inspector Online Scan.opsecNote: Active scanning required; connects to target website to analyze content

Google Safe Browsing API.description: Google's free API detecting malicious URLs and phishing sites with protection across billions of devices.
Google Safe Browsing API.opsecNote: Free for non-commercial use; commercial use requires Web Risk API (paid)

Cisco Talos.description: Cisco's comprehensive IP and domain reputation intelligence system with real-time threat detection spanning millions of sensors.
Cisco Talos.output: Reputation score, threat indicators, intelligence reports
Cisco Talos.opsecNote: Passive intelligence from Cisco's extensive network of sensors and endpoints

DNS Twist (T).description: Domain name permutation engine for detecting homograph phishing attacks and typosquatting with fuzzy hashing.
DNS Twist (T).output: Domain permutation list, DNS records, HTTP similarity
DNS Twist (T).opsecNote: Active DNS queries required; queries can be resource-intensive (300K+ queries for google.com)

URLCrazy (T).description: Ruby-based typosquatting domain generator supporting 15 variation types and 8000+ common misspellings.
URLCrazy (T).opsecNote: Generates 2000+ variants requiring DNS queries for availability checking

dnstwister.description: Web-based domain permutation tool with free lookup and paid monitoring plans for typosquatting detection.
dnstwister.output: Domain variants, registration status, DNS records
dnstwister.opsecNote: Active DNS queries required for variant checking; paid plans enable continuous monitoring

Catphish (T).description: Red team tool for generating phishing domains using homoglyphs, punycode, and domain manipulation techniques.
Catphish (T).opsecNote: Generates domains for red team operations; checks domain categorization to evade proxies

BuiltWith.description: Web technology profiler identifying CMS platforms, frameworks, analytics, and 2500+ technologies used by websites.
BuiltWith.bestFor: Web technology intelligence and competitive analysis
BuiltWith.output: Technology stack report, lead generation data
BuiltWith.opsecNote: Public website analysis; passive technical reconnaissance

SiteSleuth.description: OSINT domain analytics tool tracking Google Analytics, AdSense, and Stripe keys across 32+ million websites.
SiteSleuth.bestFor: Tracking code intelligence and related domain discovery
SiteSleuth.input: Domain, Google Analytics ID, AdSense ID, or Stripe key
SiteSleuth.output: List of associated domains and tracking codes
SiteSleuth.opsecNote: Passive intelligence from indexed tracking identifiers; no direct queries to targets
